sentences.sentence: Until three months ago, life in this humble village without electricity would come to a halt after sunset.
sentences.translation: 直到三个月前，这座没有电的简陋村庄一到日落便会停止运转。

structure.text: life in this humble village without electricity

difficult_points: would 表示过去反复出现的典型情况。
come to a halt 是固定搭配，指活动停止。

sentences.sentence: Inside his mud-and-clay home, Ganpat Jadhav's three children used to study in the dim, smoky glow of a kerosene lamp, when their monthly fuel quota of four litres dried up in just a fortnight, they had to strain their eyes using the light from a cooking fire.
sentences.translation: 在甘帕特·贾达夫泥土砌成的家里，他的三个孩子过去常借着煤油灯昏暗、烟雾弥漫的微光学习；每月四升的燃料配额仅两周就耗尽后，他们只得在灶火的光线下吃力地用眼。

structure.text: Ganpat Jadhav's three children used to study in the dim, smoky glow of a kerosene lamp
when their monthly fuel quota of four litres dried up in just a fortnight
they had to strain their eyes using the light from a cooking fire

difficult_points: used to 表示过去长期存在、现在已改变的习惯。
when 从句与前一分句仅用逗号连接，属于源文逗号拼接。
using... 是方式状语，说明孩子借助灶火光学习。

sentences.sentence: That all changed with the installation of low-cost, energy-efficient lamps that are powered entirely by the sun.
sentences.translation: 随着完全依靠太阳能供电的低成本节能灯安装到位，这一切都改变了。

structure.text: with the installation of low-cost, energy-efficient lamps
that are powered entirely by the sun

difficult_points: That all 指上文村民天黑后缺少照明的全部状况。
that 修饰 lamps，are powered by 表示灯的能源来源。

sentences.sentence: The lights were installed by the Grameen Surya Bijli Foundation (GSBF), an Indian non-governmental organisation focused on bringing light to rural India.
sentences.translation: 这些灯由格莱珉太阳能电力基金会（GSBF）安装；这是一家致力于为印度农村带来照明的非政府组织。

structure.text: were installed by the Grameen Surya Bijli Foundation (GSBF)
an Indian non-governmental organisation focused on bringing light to rural India

difficult_points: an Indian... 是 GSBF 的同位语。
focused on... 是过去分词短语，修饰 organisation。

sentences.sentence: Some 100,000 Indian villages do not yet have electricity.
sentences.translation: 印度约有10万个村庄尚未通电。
difficult_points: Some 放在数字前表示“大约”，不是“一些”村庄的泛指。
not yet 表示截至目前仍未实现，但暗含未来可能改变。

sentences.sentence: The GSBF lamps use LEDs - light emitting diodes - that are four times more efficient than a normal bulb.
sentences.translation: GSBF 的灯使用发光二极管（LED），其效率是普通灯泡的四倍。

structure.text: that are four times more efficient than a normal bulb

difficult_points: 破折号内 light emitting diodes 解释缩写 LEDs。
that 修饰 LEDs；four times more efficient 表示效率达到显著倍数。

sentences.sentence: After a $55 installation cost, solar energy lights the lamp free of charge.
sentences.translation: 支付55美元安装费后，太阳能便可免费为灯具供能照明。
difficult_points: After... 表示一次性安装成本付出之后。
free of charge 指后续太阳能照明不再产生燃料费用。

sentences.sentence: LED lighting, like cell phones, is another example of a technology whose low cost could allow the rural poor to leap into the 21st century.
sentences.translation: 与手机一样，LED 照明也是一种凭借低成本帮助农村贫困人口跃入21世纪的技术。

structure.text: is another example of a technology
whose low cost could allow the rural poor to leap into the 21st century

difficult_points: whose 指 technology，low cost 是该技术的属性。
allow the rural poor to leap... 是宾语加不定式补足语。

sentences.sentence: As many as 1.5 billion people - nearly 80 million in India alone - light their houses using kerosene as the primary lighting media.
sentences.translation: 多达15亿人以煤油作为主要照明媒介，仅印度就有近8,000万人如此照亮住宅。

structure.text: As many as 1.5 billion people - nearly 80 million in India alone -
using kerosene as the primary lighting media

difficult_points: As many as 强调人数之多，破折号内补充印度人数。
using... 是方式状语，as 表示煤油所充当的用途。

sentences.sentence: The fuel is dangerous, dirty, and - despite being subsidised - consumes nearly four per cent of a typical rural Indian household's budget.
sentences.translation: 这种燃料既危险又肮脏，而且尽管有补贴，仍会占去一个典型印度农村家庭近4%的预算。

structure.text: consumes nearly four per cent of a typical rural Indian household's budget

difficult_points: is 与 consumes 是同一主语下的并列谓语。
despite being subsidised 是让步结构，being subsidised 为动名词被动式。

sentences.sentence: A recent report by the Intermediate Technology Development Group suggests that indoor air pollution from such lighting media results in 1.6 million deaths worldwide every year.
sentences.translation: 中间技术发展集团最近的一份报告指出，此类照明媒介造成的室内空气污染每年在全球导致160万人死亡。

structure.text: A recent report by the Intermediate Technology Development Group suggests
that indoor air pollution from such lighting media results in 1.6 million deaths worldwide every year

difficult_points: that 引导 suggests 的宾语从句。
from such lighting media 修饰 indoor air pollution，说明污染来源。

sentences.sentence: LED lamps, or more specifically white LEDs, are believed to produce nearly 200 times more useful light than a kerosene lamp and almost 50 times the amount of useful light of a conventional bulb.
sentences.translation: 人们认为 LED 灯——更确切地说是白光 LED——产生的有效光几乎是煤油灯的200倍，也是传统灯泡的近50倍。

structure.text: LED lamps, or more specifically white LEDs
nearly 200 times more useful light than a kerosene lamp and almost 50 times the amount of useful light of a conventional bulb

difficult_points: or more specifically 用于把宽泛的 LED lamps 精确为 white LEDs。
are believed to 是被动报告结构。
两个倍数短语并列，分别与煤油灯和普通灯泡比较。

sentences.sentence: "This technology can light an entire rural village with less energy than that used by a single conventional 100-watt light bulb," says Dave Irvine-Halliday, a professor of electrical engineering at the University of Calgary, Canada and the founder of Light up the World Foundation (LUTW).
sentences.translation: “这项技术照亮整个农村村庄所需的能源，比一只普通100瓦灯泡的耗能还少。”加拿大卡尔加里大学电气工程教授、照亮世界基金会（LUTW）创始人戴夫·欧文-哈利迪说。

structure.text: This technology can light an entire rural village with less energy than that used by a single conventional 100-watt light bulb
a professor of electrical engineering at the University of Calgary, Canada and the founder of Light up the World Foundation (LUTW)

difficult_points: that 替代 energy，used by... 是过去分词短语修饰 that。
引语后采用 says 加说话者的倒装语序。
a professor... and the founder... 是 Dave 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: Founded in 1997, LUTW has used LED technology to bring light to nearly 10,000 homes in remote and disadvantaged corners of some 27 countries like India, Nepal, Sri Lanka, Bolivia, and the Philippines.
sentences.translation: LUTW 成立于1997年，已经利用 LED 技术为印度、尼泊尔、斯里兰卡、玻利维亚和菲律宾等约27个国家偏远贫困地区的近1万户家庭带去光明。

structure.text: to bring light to nearly 10,000 homes in remote and disadvantaged corners of some 27 countries like India, Nepal, Sri Lanka, Bolivia, and the Philippines

difficult_points: Founded... 的逻辑主语是 LUTW，表示成立时间。
to bring... 是目的状语；remote and disadvantaged 同时修饰 corners。

sentences.sentence: The technology, which is not yet widely known in India, faces some scepticism here.
sentences.translation: 这项技术在印度尚未广为人知，因此在当地面临一些质疑。

structure.text: which is not yet widely known in India

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充技术的认知度。
here 指 India；face scepticism 表示遭到怀疑。

sentences.sentence: "LED systems are revolutionising rural lighting, but this isn't a magic solution to the world's energy problems," says Ashok Jhunjhunwala, head of the electrical engineering department at the Indian Institute of Technology, Madras.
sentences.translation: “LED 系统正在彻底改变农村照明，但它并不是解决全球能源问题的万能办法。”印度理工学院马德拉斯分校电气工程系主任阿肖克·金金瓦拉说。

structure.text: LED systems are revolutionising rural lighting, but this isn't a magic solution to the world's energy problems
head of the electrical engineering department at the Indian Institute of Technology, Madras

difficult_points: but 连接“带来变革”与“并非万能方案”两层相反判断。
this 指 LED systems 所代表的技术；head... 是说话者职务同位语。

sentences.sentence: In a scenario in which nearly 60 per cent of India's rural population uses 180 million tons of biomass per year for cooking via primitive wood stoves -which are smoky and provide only 10-15 per cent efficiency in cooking -Jhunjhunwala emphasises the need for a clean energy source, not just for lighting but for other domestic purposes as well.
sentences.translation: 在印度近60%的农村人口每年通过原始柴火炉消耗1.8亿吨生物质做饭的情况下——这种炉灶烟雾很大，烹饪效率仅为10%至15%——金金瓦拉强调需要清洁能源，不仅用于照明，也用于其他家庭用途。

structure.text: In a scenario in which nearly 60 per cent of India's rural population uses 180 million tons of biomass per year for cooking via primitive wood stoves
which are smoky and provide only 10-15 per cent efficiency in cooking
Jhunjhunwala emphasises the need for a clean energy source
not just for lighting but for other domestic purposes as well

difficult_points: in which 引导定语从句修饰 scenario。
破折号内 which 指 primitive wood stoves。
not just... but... as well 强调清洁能源还须满足其他家庭用途；源文破折号后缺空格。

sentences.sentence: The Indian government in April launched an ambitious project to bring electricity to 112,000 rural villages in the next decade.
sentences.translation: 印度政府于4月启动了一项雄心勃勃的计划，准备在未来十年为11.2万个农村村庄通电。

structure.text: to bring electricity to 112,000 rural villages in the next decade

difficult_points: in April 插在主语与谓语之间，表示项目启动时间。
to bring... 修饰 project，说明计划目标。

expressions.meaning_zh: 启动一项雄心勃勃的计划

sentences.sentence: However, the remote locations of the village will make reaching this goal difficult.
sentences.translation: 然而，村庄地处偏远，会增加实现这一目标的难度。

structure.text: the remote locations of the village

difficult_points: make 后是“动名词宾语＋形容词补足语”结构。
the village 用单数与上文多个村庄不协调，是源文语法异常。

sentences.sentence: A. K. Lakhina, the chairman of India's Rural Electrification Corporation, says the Indian government recognises the potential of LED lighting powered by solar technology, but expressed reservations about its high costs.
sentences.translation: 印度农村电气化公司主席 A. K. 拉希纳表示，印度政府认可太阳能 LED 照明的潜力，但对其高成本有所保留。

structure.text: the chairman of India's Rural Electrification Corporation
says the Indian government recognises the potential of LED lighting powered by solar technology
but expressed reservations about its high costs

difficult_points: A. K. 是姓名首字母，句点不表示句子结束。
powered by solar technology 是过去分词短语，修饰 LED lighting。
says 与 expressed 时态不一致，是源文表达；its 指 LED lighting。

sentences.sentence: "If only LEDs weren't imported but manufactured locally," he says, "and in bulk."
sentences.translation: “要是 LED 不是进口，而是在本地大批量生产就好了。”他说。

structure.text: If only LEDs weren't imported but manufactured locally

difficult_points: If only 加过去式表达对当前情况难以实现的愿望。
weren't imported 与 manufactured locally 是对比的被动结构，后者省略 weren't。
and in bulk 是补充性省略，意为还应大批量生产。

sentences.sentence: The lamps installed in nearly 300 homes by GSBF cost nearly half the price of other solar lighting systems.
sentences.translation: GSBF 在近300户家庭安装的灯具，价格几乎只有其他太阳能照明系统的一半。

structure.text: The lamps installed in nearly 300 homes by GSBF
nearly half the price of other solar lighting systems

difficult_points: installed... 是过去分词短语，修饰 lamps。
half the price of 表示价格约为比较对象的一半。

sentences.sentence: Jasjeet Singh Chaddha, the founder of the NGO, currently imports his LEDs from China.
sentences.translation: 该非政府组织创始人贾斯吉特·辛格·查达目前从中国进口 LED。

structure.text: currently imports his LEDs from China

difficult_points: the founder of the NGO 是主语的同位语。
currently 强调本地制造计划实现之前的现状。

sentences.sentence: He wants to set up an LED manufacturing unit and a solar panel manufacturing unit in India.
sentences.translation: 他希望在印度建立 LED 生产厂和太阳能板生产厂。

structure.text: an LED manufacturing unit and a solar panel manufacturing unit

difficult_points: He 指 Chaddha。
两个 manufacturing unit 并列作 set up 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: If manufactured locally, the cost of his LED lamp could plummet to $22, as they will not incur heavy import duties.
sentences.translation: 如果在本地生产，他的 LED 灯成本可能骤降至22美元，因为这样便不会承担高额进口关税。

structure.text: the cost of his LED lamp could plummet to $22
as they will not incur heavy import duties

difficult_points: If manufactured locally 省略主语和 be，逻辑上指 LED lamps。
as 引导原因；they 与单数 lamp/cost 指代不一致，是源文异常。

sentences.sentence: "We need close to $5 million for this," he says.
sentences.translation: “为此我们需要近500万美元。”他说。

structure.text: We need close to $5 million for this

difficult_points: close to 修饰金额，表示接近但不到。
this 指在印度建立 LED 和太阳能板生产设施。

sentences.sentence: Mr. Chaddha says he has also asked the government to exempt the lamps from such duties, but to no avail.
sentences.translation: 查达先生说，他也曾请求政府免除这些灯具的此类关税，但没有成功。

structure.text: he has also asked the government to exempt the lamps from such duties

difficult_points: Mr. 中的句点是称谓缩写，不是句末。
ask the government to... 是宾语加不定式补足语。
to no avail 表示努力没有取得结果。

sentences.sentence: An entrepreneur who made his money in plastics, Chaddha, has poured his own money into the project, providing the initial installations free of charge.
sentences.translation: 查达是一位靠塑料行业发家的企业家，他已把自己的资金投入该项目，并免费提供首批安装服务。

structure.text: An entrepreneur who made his money in plastics, Chaddha
has poured his own money into the project
providing the initial installations free of charge

difficult_points: An entrepreneur... 与 Chaddha 构成同位关系，who 修饰 entrepreneur。
providing... 是伴随或结果状语，其逻辑主语是 Chaddha。

sentences.sentence: As he looks to make the project self-sustainable, he recognises that it is only urban markets -which have also shown an avid interest in LED lighting - that can pay.
sentences.translation: 在努力让项目实现自我维持的过程中，他认识到，只有城市市场有能力付费——而城市市场也对 LED 照明表现出浓厚兴趣。

structure.text: As he looks to make the project self-sustainable
that it is only urban markets -which have also shown an avid interest in LED lighting - that can pay

difficult_points: look to do 表示力图做某事。
it is... that... 是强调结构，强调 only urban markets。
破折号内 which 修饰 urban markets；源文破折号前后空格异常。

sentences.sentence: The rural markets in India cannot afford it, he says, until the prices are brought down.
sentences.translation: 他说，在价格降下来之前，印度农村市场负担不起这种产品。

structure.text: The rural markets in India cannot afford it
until the prices are brought down

difficult_points: it 指 LED lighting 产品或系统。
he says 是插入语；until 从句说明负担得起的前提时点。

sentences.sentence: The rural markets would be able to afford it, says Mr. Irvine-Halliday, if they had access to microcredit.
sentences.translation: 欧文-哈利迪先生说，如果农村市场能够获得小额信贷，就可以负担这种产品。

structure.text: The rural markets would be able to afford it
if they had access to microcredit

difficult_points: Mr. 是称谓缩写，不能在其后断句。
would... if they had... 构成与当前情况相反或较不现实的条件表达。
they 指 rural markets，语义上指农村消费者。

sentences.sentence: He says that in Tembisa, a shanty town in
sentences.translation: 他说，在坦比萨——一座位于……的棚户区城镇（本段原文到此中断）。

structure.text: that in Tembisa, a shanty town in

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，但该从句在段末被截断。
a shanty town 是 Tembisa 的同位说明，末尾 in 的宾语被拆到下一段。

sentences.sentence: Johannesburg, he found that almost 10,000 homes spent more than $60 each on candles and paraffin every year.
sentences.translation: 约翰内斯堡，他发现近1万户家庭每年每户在蜡烛和石蜡上的花费超过60美元（本句承接上一段末尾）。

structure.text: that almost 10,000 homes spent more than $60 each on candles and paraffin every year

difficult_points: Johannesburg 是上一段末尾介词 in 的宾语，因源数据分段而出现在本段句首。
that 引导 found 的宾语从句；each 表示每户各自的支出。

sentences.sentence: As calculations revealed, these families can afford to purchase a solid state lighting system in just over a year of paying per week what they would normally spend on candles and paraffin - if they have access to microcredit.
sentences.translation: 计算显示，如果能够获得小额信贷，这些家庭只需每周支付平时购买蜡烛和石蜡的费用，略多于一年便能买得起一套固态照明系统。

structure.text: these families can afford to purchase a solid state lighting system
in just over a year of paying per week what they would normally spend on candles and paraffin
if they have access to microcredit

difficult_points: what they would normally spend... 是融合关系结构，作 paying 的金额内容。
if 从句说明这一付款方案成立的条件。
just over a year 表示略多于一年。

sentences.sentence: LUTW is in the process of creating such a microcredit facility for South Africa.
sentences.translation: LUTW 正在为南非建立这样一套小额信贷机制。

structure.text: is in the process of creating

difficult_points: be in the process of doing 强调工作正在推进。
such 指上文所述帮助家庭分期购买照明系统的信贷安排。

expressions.text: be in the process of creating

sentences.sentence: In villages near Khadakwadi, the newly installed LED lamps are a subject of envy, even for those connected to the grid.
sentences.translation: 在卡达克瓦迪附近的村庄，新安装的 LED 灯甚至令已经接入电网的人羡慕。

structure.text: even for those connected to the grid

difficult_points: installed 是过去分词作前置修饰语。
those 指 people，connected to the grid 是过去分词短语后置修饰。

sentences.sentence: Those connected to the grid have to face power cuts up to 6 or 7 hours a day.
sentences.translation: 接入电网的人每天仍不得不面对长达六七个小时的停电。

structure.text: power cuts up to 6 or 7 hours a day

difficult_points: connected... 后置修饰 Those。
up to 强调停电时长最高可达六七小时。

expressions.text: up to 6 or 7 hours a day

sentences.sentence: Constant energy shortages and blackouts are a common problem due to a lack of power plants, transmission, and distribution losses caused by old technology and illegal stealing of electricity from the grid.
sentences.translation: 由于发电厂不足、老旧技术造成输配电损耗，以及非法从电网窃电，持续的能源短缺和停电成为普遍问题。

structure.text: due to a lack of power plants, transmission, and distribution losses caused by old technology and illegal stealing of electricity from the grid

difficult_points: due to 引出能源短缺和停电的多重原因。
caused by... 是过去分词短语，修饰 transmission, and distribution losses。
a lack of power plants, transmission 的并列关系不完整，是源文表达问题。

expressions.text: stealing of electricity from the grid

sentences.sentence: LED systems require far less maintenance, a longer life, and as villagers jokingly say, "no electricity bills".
sentences.translation: LED 系统所需维护少得多、寿命更长，而且正如村民开玩笑说的：“没有电费账单。”

structure.text: require far less maintenance, a longer life

difficult_points: as villagers jokingly say 是插入的评论从句。
require a longer life 搭配不自然，通常应表达 have a longer life，属于源文问题。

sentences.sentence: The lamps provided by GSBF have enough power to provide just four hours of light a day.
sentences.translation: GSBF 提供的灯具电量只够每天照明四小时。

structure.text: to provide just four hours of light a day

difficult_points: provided by GSBF 是过去分词短语，修饰 lamps。
to provide... 说明 enough power 所能支持的具体照明量。

expressions.text: four hours of light a day

sentences.sentence: However, that is enough for people to get their work done in the early hours of the night, and is more reliable than light generated off India's electrical grid.
sentences.translation: 不过，这已足以让人们在入夜后的几个小时完成工作，而且比印度电网提供的照明更可靠。

structure.text: that is enough for people to get their work done in the early hours of the night
and is more reliable than light generated off India's electrical grid

difficult_points: that 指每天四小时的照明。
get their work done 是“get＋宾语＋过去分词”结构，表示把工作完成。
generated off... 修饰 light，表示电网产生的照明。

sentences.sentence: Villagers are educated by GSBF officials to make the most of the new lamps.
sentences.translation: GSBF 工作人员会指导村民充分利用这些新灯具。

structure.text: to make the most of the new lamps

difficult_points: are educated by 是被动语态，此处指接受使用指导。
to make the most of... 表示指导的目的。

sentences.sentence: An official from GSBF instructs Jadhav and his family to clean the lamp regularly.
sentences.translation: 一名 GSBF 工作人员指导贾达夫及其家人定期清洁灯具。
difficult_points: instruct somebody to do 是宾语加不定式补足语。
regularly 修饰 clean，强调维护频率。

sentences.sentence: "Its luminosity and life will diminish if you let the dust settle on it," he warns them.
sentences.translation: “如果任由灰尘落在灯上，它的亮度和寿命都会下降。”他警告他们。

structure.text: Its luminosity and life will diminish
if you let the dust settle on it

difficult_points: Its 与 it 都指 lamp。
let the dust settle 是“let＋宾语＋动词原形”结构。
he warns them 位于引语之后，he 指 GSBF 工作人员。
